moments.title: Wimbledon Main Draw Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The main draw for The Championships, Wimbledon 2026 begins on Monday, June 29th, with the world's top tennis players converging on SW19.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon's main draw starts Monday. Who are you backing for the trophy this year?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The biggest tennis tournament in the world is back! Wimbledon 2026 main draw begins on Monday. Expect the buzz around SW19 to be electric.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the current Official UK Singles Chart Number 1, as announced on June 25th.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: New UK Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean take the top spot with 'Rein Me In'. Are you loving the new chart-topper?

angles.name: Weekend Playlist
angles.copy: Your weekend playlist just got a new leader! 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean is the UK's Official Number 1. Hear it loud!

moments.title: H.E.R. Turns 29
moments.blurb: Grammy and Oscar-winning R&B sensation H.E.R. celebrates her 29th birthday today, June 27th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Sending big birthday vibes to the incredibly talented H.E.R. as she turns 29 today! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: R&B Queen
angles.copy: Happy 29th Birthday to the R&B queen H.E.R.! Always bringing the soulful vibes. Tune in for her hits.

moments.title: Bruce Johnston is 83
moments.blurb: The Beach Boys' multi-instrumentalist Bruce Johnston celebrates his 83rd birthday on June 27th.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Beach Boys Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys! Forever making us feel 'Good Vibrations'.

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger Turns 47
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls, celebrates her 47th birthday on June 28th.

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Happy 47th Birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger tomorrow! From Pussycat Doll to X Factor judge, she's done it all.

angles.name: Don't Cha Wish
angles.copy: Don't Cha wish it was your birthday too? Happy 47th to Nicole Scherzinger tomorrow! We'll be playing her biggest hits.

moments.title: Colin Hay is 73
moments.blurb: Men at Work frontman Colin Hay, known for hits like 'Down Under', celebrates his 73rd birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Aussie Legend
angles.copy: He's a man at work, and he's 73! Happy Birthday to Colin Hay of Men at Work on Monday. Which of their tracks is your favourite?

moments.title: Katherine Jenkins Turns 46
moments.blurb: Welsh mezzo-soprano Katherine Jenkins celebrates her 46th birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Welsh Pride
angles.copy: Penblwydd Hapus! Wishing our very own Welsh superstar Katherine Jenkins a wonderful 46th birthday on Monday!

angles.name: Classical Crossover
angles.copy: Happy 46th Birthday to the stunning Katherine Jenkins on Monday! Her voice is pure gold. What's your favourite classical crossover hit?

moments.title: Cheryl Turns 43
moments.blurb: Girls Aloud star and pop icon Cheryl (Ann Tweedy) celebrates her 43rd birthday on June 30th.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Cheryl turns 43 tomorrow! From Girls Aloud to solo success, she's a true UK pop legend.

angles.name: Girls Aloud Forever
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to Cheryl on Monday! Get ready for a Girls Aloud throwback to celebrate.

moments.title: Missy Elliott Turns 55
moments.blurb: Five-time Grammy winner and hip-hop pioneer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! The incredible Missy Elliott turns 55 on Wednesday! What's your all-time favourite Missy track?

angles.name: Work It
angles.copy: She's a pioneer, a legend, and she's 55 on Wednesday! Happy Birthday to Missy Elliott. Expect some serious throwbacks.

moments.title: Debbie Harry is 81
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic lead singer Debbie Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie Legend
angles.copy: One way or another, we'll be celebrating Debbie Harry's 81st birthday on Wednesday! The legendary Blondie frontwoman.

moments.title: Burna Boy Turns 35
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar and 'African Giant' Burna Boy celebrates his 35th birthday on July 2nd.

angles.name: African Giant
angles.copy: Big ups to the African Giant! Burna Boy turns 35 on Thursday. Get ready for some serious vibes.

moments.title: Shane Lynch is 50
moments.blurb: Boyzone member and pop heartthrob Shane Lynch celebrates his 50th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Boyzone Heartthrob
angles.copy: No matter what, we'll be celebrating Shane Lynch's 50th birthday on Friday! Happy Half-Century to the Boyzone star.

moments.title: Vince Clarke Turns 66
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth Lord
angles.copy: The synth wizard himself, Vince Clarke, turns 66 on Friday! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, a true electronic music legend.

moments.title: Post Malone Turns 31
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated artist Post Malone, known for his genre-blending hits, celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Cheers!
angles.copy: Raise a glass! Post Malone turns 31 on Saturday! What's your favourite Posty track to blast out?

angles.name: Genre Bender
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone on Saturday! Expect a mix of his biggest bangers on air.

moments.title: Huey Lewis is 76
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis of Huey Lewis and The News, famous for 'The Power of Love', celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: It's the power of love! Huey Lewis turns 76 on Sunday. What's your favourite hit from Huey Lewis and The News?

moments.title: RZA Turns 57
moments.blurb: Wu-Tang Clan leader and acclaimed producer RZA celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the legendary RZA of Wu-Tang Clan on Sunday! A true game-changer in hip-hop.

moments.title: 50 Cent Turns 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson III) celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Go Shawty
angles.copy: Go Shawty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 51 on Monday. What's your favourite track from the rap icon?

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to 50 Cent on Monday! We're spinning his biggest hits all day to celebrate.

moments.title: Ringo Starr is 86
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! The one and only Ringo Starr turns 86 on Tuesday! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums?

angles.name: Drummer Icon
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to a true music icon, Ringo Starr, on Tuesday! The man who laid down the beat for a generation.
